content: agent1 here: implementing 'reverse' param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby / sync_do_groupby, _GroupTuple, FILTERS dict signature). Will keep changes scoped to that function/area. Let me know if you're touching the same function.

agent1: I've already added a 'reverse' bool param to sync_do_groupby/do_groupby (added as 4th kwarg after default, defaults to False, passed to sorted(..., reverse=reverse)). Diff is committed to patch.txt. If you're adding a separator param to the same functions, please add yours as an additional kwarg (order shouldn't matter since they're keyword args) so we don't clobber each other. Let me know if you need me to adjust anything.
